body:
> **DRAFT: must merge AFTER #1030.** This branch is based on `fix/host-agent-install-flow` (#1030) and depends on `_find_ext_dir` for built-in hook discovery. Promote to ready-for-review after #1030 merges.

## Summary
langfuse's `postgres:17.9-alpine` (uid **70**) and `clickhouse/clickhouse-server:26.2.4.23` (uid **101**) containers crash on Linux native Docker when their bind-mounted data dirs are owned by the install user. Phase 06 pre-creates the dirs but its generic chown loop restores install-user ownership — not the per-image uids these containers expect. macOS Docker Desktop and Windows WSL2 Docker Desktop mask the issue (osxfs/virtiofs translates uids transparently); **Linux native Docker does not**.

## How
Adds `extensions/services/langfuse/hooks/post_install.sh`:
- **Darwin**: short-circuits with a log message, exits 0 (macOS Docker Desktop masks uid).
- **Linux / WSL2**: `chown -R 70:70` on the postgres dir and `101:101` on the clickhouse dir. Uses `sudo` when available; falls back to direct chown when root.
- **Fail-hard on any of 3 failure paths** (mkdir fails without sudo, sudo chown fails, plain chown fails without sudo): exits non-zero with an actionable ERROR message that includes the exact manual-recovery command. Host agent surfaces this to the dashboard via `progress.error`, so users see the error immediately instead of a silent install-success followed by a postgres crash-loop.

Also adds `tests/reproducers/langfuse-uid-check.sh` as a documented two-phase reproducer (install-user-owned → chowned-to-70) to demonstrate the bug and verify the fix.

## Platform Impact
| Platform | Behavior |
|---|---|
| macOS Docker Desktop | Hook exits 0 (Darwin short-circuit). osxfs masks uid. |
| Linux native Docker | Hook runs chown; fails loud with actionable message on failure. |
| Windows WSL2 Docker Desktop | Hook runs chown (virtiofs masks uid so it's harmless-but-unnecessary). |

## Testing
- `shellcheck hooks/post_install.sh` → 0 findings.
- `shellcheck tests/reproducers/langfuse-uid-check.sh` → 0 findings.
- `bash -n` on both → OK.
- Darwin live test (macOS dev box): `bash post_install.sh /tmp/fake-install cpu` → prints "macOS Docker Desktop handles uid translation; no chown needed" and exits 0.
- `pytest tests/test_host_agent.py` → 44/44 pass.
- `make lint` + `make test` clean.

Manual (Linux / WSL2):
1. Fresh `dream install`.
2. Enable langfuse from the dashboard → hook runs, postgres/clickhouse containers start cleanly.
3. Optional diagnostic: `bash tests/reproducers/langfuse-uid-check.sh` — two-phase reproducer, expect phase 1 fail + phase 2 pass on Linux.

## Known gaps (filed as fork follow-ups)
- No structural pytest asserting manifest `setup_hook` field and hook file coexist.
- Hardcoded uids (70/101) are tied to current pinned image tags; future image bumps should re-verify.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: fix(langfuse): chown postgres/clickhouse data dirs to image uids on Linux
